title: HYPERFIST
description:
Deliver the most radical punch in HYPERFIST, the fast-paced punk-rock first person puncher game! After the deed to the planet Earth was acquired by the robotic Khi Corporation, they descended to terraform the whole place into a huge planetary parking lot. Play as the local punk who wants nothing more than to punch the capitalist corpos in their stupid robot faces. 

• Use your radical mecha-fists to unleash combos and flashy specials against corporate bots that completely deserve it!

• Keep your combo up! The more stylishly you play, the more powerful your fists become!

• Utilize your many movement abilities to rush through 3 levels, all full of dangerous enemy encounters!

• Punch a path all the way to the top of Khi Corp's tower and take down the enormous final boss!

• Jam to the amazing punk-rock soundtrack as you fight off waves of robotic enemies!

This game was developed as a student project at DigiPen Institute of Technology and was created for educational purposes only. Please check out our publisher page for more information.
description_short: HYPERFIST is a fast-paced, comic-styled, first person melee action game focused on punching, grabbing, and other hand-to-hand combat. Play as Heath, the local punk, and use your mecha-fists to punch the robotic enemies in a fast and fluid combat system!
